utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 corresponding sections. Now check completeness: 
- destination: Provided (Prague, Czech Republic) — sufficient.
- travel_dates: Provided with specific dates — sufficient.
- transportation: Has details (round-trip flight, airline type/class) and cost — sufficient for 'flight details with costs'.
- accommodation: Has hotel selection name and nights plus cost — sufficient.
- activities: Two activities each with details and cost — sufficient.
- additional_services: One service with details and cost — sufficient.
- total_budget: Provides total_cost and initial_budget — sufficient as a complete cost breakdown (matches summed components: €120+€220+€35+€20+€30=€425). All items are fully specified per the required format.
